steps.title: Identify the contradictory relationship
steps.content: The passage establishes that one might assume there's a real deep hole, but then reveals this is wrong — the artwork is merely the illusion of depth.

steps.title: Match the transition to the reversal
steps.content: On the contrary signals that the second sentence contradicts the first, reversing assumption with reality. The others express addition, causation, or sequence—none signal contradiction. This matches the correct answer — B is correct.
